---
title: "Compiz setting for dell inspiron 5420 64bit"
date: 2013-05-25
forum: Desktop Environments
---

### Post by arvindp on 2013-05-25
Hi All,

I want to experience compiz effect in my new laptop
specially 3d and water and bubbling effect

but not able to see those in my compiz setting. please help me to fix this

result of **lspci -v** command

00:02.0 VGA compatible controller: Intel Corporation Ivy Bridge Graphics Controller (rev 09) (prog-if 00 [VGA controller])
    Subsystem: Dell Device 055d
    Flags: bus master, fast devsel, latency 0, IRQ 42
    Memory at d0000000 (64-bit, non-prefetchable) [size=4M]
    Memory at c0000000 (64-bit, prefetchable) [size=256M]
    I/O ports at 3000 [size=64]
    Expansion ROM at <unassigned> [disabled]
    Capabilities: <access denied>
    Kernel driver in use: i915
    Kernel modules: i915

------------------------------------------------------------

Screen shot of compiz setting

[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/image/png;base64,[/IMG]

---

### Post by zombifier25 on 2013-05-25
You need to install the package "compiz-plugins-extra" first. It'll give you the cube and more effects.
```
sudo apt-get install compiz-plugins-extra
```

---

### Post by arvindp on 2013-05-26
Thanks for reply,

I installed as you told by command but still not able to see water and bubbling effect option  :(
[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/image/png;base64,[/IMG]

### Post by zombifier25 on 2013-05-27
Are you sure you have installed it, and/or checked all the plugins in ccsm? Since water effects shows up for me (I don't know what you meant with the bubbling effects)

---
